case_title: PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA VS. FAYE ROBERTS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA ACCOUNT RESOLUTION ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, FAYE AKA FAYE DELORES ROBERTS $6,171.96 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $6,892.48 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,149.44, ** LESS CREIDT OF $300, TOTAL JUDGMENT AMOUNT IS $13,849.44, ** SEE SCANNED DOC
